name: apicmd
description: Turn any API into a CLI. Designed for LLM agents.

scripts.build:
bun build bin/apicmd.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/apicmd.js';let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');c=c.replace(/^#!.*
(// @bun
)?/,'#!/usr/bin/env node
');fs.writeFileSync(f,c);fs.chmodSync(f,0o755)"
